Body.Content:
Enable change leaders to quickly identify and auto-populate Microsoft 365 Copilot power users and novice users based on organizational attributes and aggregated Copilot usage data. Automatic audience targeting in Viva Pulse will empower change leaders to capture sentiment on Copilot use cases, verbatims, and learnings with insights into whether specific audiences need more training or whether certain pockets of the organization would benefit from receiving upgraded Copilot licenses.

GA date: July CY2026

Preview date: June CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Viva: Viva Pulse - Capture targeted Copilot sentiment from power and novice users
